message:
feat: add WebSearch to GenerateOptions and propagate to Request

WebSearch was already on Request and checked by all adapters, but
GenerateOptions had no way to set it. Both Generate() and
StreamGenerate() now propagate the field to the Request they build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,6 +170,7 @@ func StreamGenerate(ctx context.Context, opts GenerateOptions) (*StreamResult, e
 				ReasoningEffort: opts.ReasoningEffort,
 				Metadata:        opts.Metadata,
 				ProviderOptions: opts.ProviderOptions,
+				WebSearch:       opts.WebSearch,
 				AdapterTimeout:  opts.AdapterTimeout,
 			}
